title: senecio gothicus
intro: Senecio gothicus, also known as Goth's ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Senecio gothicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
